# FirstPromoter vs Rewardful: Honest Comparison 2026 (YouTube + VGS)

**URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bWOqTj01hfU (transcript via Perplexity)
**Retrieved:** 2026-05-20
**Source type:** comparison
**Authority:** high
**Relevance:** high
**Topic:** platform-selection

## Summary

April 2026 video comparison covering setup speed, campaign management, branding, payout mechanics, and tax compliance. Key finding: both platforms start at $49/month with 2-month annual discount (brings to ~$490/year). FirstPromoter covers up to $5,000/month in affiliate revenue on the Starter plan; Rewardful covers $7,500/month. Both collect tax forms (W-9, W-8 BEN, EU invoices) through their dashboards - FirstPromoter on the Business plan, Rewardful with managed payouts in beta. Both support PayPal and Wise bulk payouts. Rewardful managed payouts service (handles identity checks, tax forms) is currently in beta. FirstPromoter supports 3 campaigns on Starter, unlimited affiliates; Rewardful 1 campaign, no affiliate cap.

## Key facts for stinger-forge

- **Tax compliance differentiator:** FirstPromoter collects W-9/W-8 BEN + EU invoices natively (Business plan). Rewardful has managed payouts in beta (fee charged). This is material for the payout design guide - US programs paying affiliates over IRS threshold need W-9s.
- **Setup speed:** Rewardful ~15-20 minutes (no-code, 5-step). FirstPromoter longer but more customizable.
- **Branding:** FirstPromoter allows custom CSS + JavaScript, embeddable portal, built-in email automation to affiliates. Rewardful: branded portal with limited customization.
- **Campaign limits:** FirstPromoter 3 campaigns on Starter (supports sub-affiliates up to 3 levels), Rewardful 1 campaign on Starter.
- **Payout channels (both platforms):** PayPal, Wise bulk payouts. FirstPromoter premium: managed auto payouts. Rewardful: managed payouts beta.
- **Revenue caps at enterprise tier ($149/mo):** Both platforms move to enterprise when affiliate-driven revenue exceeds $15,000/month.
- **Reporting depth:** FirstPromoter tracks 18 data points (refunds, churn, downgrades). Rewardful: top-level metrics with deep Stripe dashboard integration.
- **Decision rule for stinger-forge:** Choose FirstPromoter when you need multiple campaigns, detailed reporting, tax form collection, and plan to embed the portal. Choose Rewardful when you want fastest setup (15 min), Stripe/Paddle only, and a simpler UI.
